member.summary:
Check is Travel status of Dump Truck is Anomaly (Overspeed/Delay) or not.
And if Dump Truck is Anomaly Delay, then check is Breakdown or not

member.name: M:HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Trips.TripService.CheckIsConvoyOrNotAsync(HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Database.AmcDbHaulConnectContext,HaulConnect.Worker.Domain.Entities.Trip,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check is convoy or not (less than 70 meters or less thhan 6 seconds)

member.name: M:HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Trips.TripService.CheckIfThereIsAQueueAtTheLoadingPointAsync(HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Database.AmcDbHaulConnectContext,HaulConnect.Worker.Domain.Entities.Trip,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if there is a queue at the loading point more than 3 units.

member.name: M:HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Trips.TripService.CheckIfLoadingTimeIsTooLongAsync(HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Database.AmcDbHaulConnectContext,HaulConnect.Worker.Domain.Entities.Trip,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check is Loading Time > 30 minutes or not, from first timwstamp Loading Started and current timestamp of Dump Truck

member.name: M:HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Trips.TripService.CheckIfAnyUnitThatNotYetPassedOutAsync(HaulConnect.Worker.Services.DateAndTime.IDateAndTimeService,HaulConnect.Worker.Infrastructure.Database.AmcDbHaulConnectContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if there's Unit that not yet Passed Out > 45 minutes after loading finished
